title: stipa pennata subsp. sabulosa
intro: Stipa pennata subsp. sabulosa, also known as sand bent or sand fescue, is a type of perennial grass that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stipa pennata subsp. sabulosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is used in herbal medicine to treat various conditions, such as digestive issues and respiratory problems.
